response.justification: Maria Rodriguez’s background is heavily skewed toward software development, web/mobile technologies, and general IT infrastructure, with no direct experience in SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, or AI accelerator optimization. While she demonstrates strong software engineering skills and leadership in backend/frontend systems, her resume lacks evidence of performance analysis for deep-learning workloads, GPU architecture, or hardware optimization—core requirements for this role. Her education (BSc in CS) and experience do not meet the expected technical depth for a Principal Performance Architect in AI hardware/cloud infrastructure.
strengths: Strong software engineering and full-stack development experience across multiple languages and frameworks
Proven ability to lead technical projects, mentor teams, and contribute to open-source platforms (e.g., GISCollective)
Experience with performance optimization in low-latency systems and micro-services architectures
concerns: No direct experience with SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, or AI accelerator performance analysis
Lacks required background in GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD, or deep-learning workload optimization
Education and experience do not meet the seniority threshold for the Principal-level role (e.g., no PhD, Master’s + 6 years, or Bachelor’s + 8 years in relevant engineering/CS fields)
